name: Cream of Broccoli Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Red potatoes, peeled and chopped
2 medium Stalks broccoli, one chopped and one cut into small florets
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the leeks and garlic in 1/3 cup water for 5 minutes.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (except broccoli florets) and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to medium and simmer for 40 minutes, or until potatoes are tender.
4. Remove bay leaf. Blend mixture in batches until smooth and creamy.
5. Return blended mixture to pan and keep warm.
6. In a separate saucepan, cook broccoli florets in water to cover over medium heat for 5 minutes.
7. Drain the cooked broccoli and add to soup mixture.
8. Season with freshly ground pepper to taste.
Variation: Cauliflower can be substituted for broccoli for delicious results!
